spec_match.rationale: Successfully illustrates the dual-pane design pattern matching how the viewport segment list/thread mapping works.

interactive.rationale: Enables interactive device simulation buttons to observe flat vs horizontal fold vs vertical fold behavior.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns perfectly with the milestone explanation of the dual-pane list-detail pattern.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides standard stacked/swipe-right behavior fallback on flat screens when only 1 segment is detected.

references.rationale: Links to ChromeStatus entry and features index page.

design_system.rationale: CSS matches design standards and keeps appropriate contrast levels.

summary: An engaging showcase of list-detail foldable interaction that serves as a prime example of real-world adaptation.
